name: Financial Controls - Manual Journal Entry Review 2024

control_objective.control_name: Manual Journal Entry Review and Approval

testing_attributes.name: Complete JE listing obtained and sample reconciled
Above-threshold JEs (>100K GBP) reviewed by Finance Director
Dual authorization verified — preparer and approver are different individuals
Supporting documentation is attached and referenced
Journal entry posted within correct accounting period (within 5 days of period end)

instructions: Execute fieldwork for Control FIN-042. There are 5 sample items. Verify: (A) the JE listing is complete at control level, (B) above-threshold entries (>GBP 100K) have Finance Director sign-off, (C) each entry has dual authorization (preparer != approver), (D) supporting docs are attached, and (E) entries are posted in the correct period. Review the approval emails and JE listing PDF for evidence. The policy document defines the rules.
